section_analysis.description: Punchy minimalist rock. High rhythmic focus. Focus on 'Internet skull' and 'Alkaloid'.
High-impact melodic release. 'Ego Rock' hook. Focus on 'Nonsense' and 'Bye-bye'.

lyrics.original: 僕の心はエゴロック 斜め45度ナンセンス
lyrics.romaji: Boku no kokoro wa ego rokku naname yonjuugodo nansensu
lyrics.meta: Signature motif. Core identity of the song.

lyrics.original: ノウハウ砕いてマンネリを 明日にバイバイバイ
lyrics.romaji: Nouhau kudaite manneri wo ashita ni baibai bai

stylistic_dna.main_instrument: Fuzzy Electric Guitar, Punchy Rock Drums, Simple Bass
